Srishti Fernandes

Product Designer / UI-UX Designer

Designing for Clarity and Scale

I am a Principal Product Designer and Information Architect focused on solving complex problems through calm, elegant, and highly readable interfaces.

My work sits at the intersection of systems thinking and visual design—crafting experiences that are not only beautiful but structurally sound.
